tweet.text:
𝐓𝐄𝐄𝐓𝐄𝐄𝐏𝐎𝐑 𝐒𝐎𝐂𝐈𝐀𝐋 𝐄𝐍𝐆𝐀𝐆𝐄𝐌𝐄𝐍𝐓
Period Covered: 01 May 2026 - 08 May 2026
Data Timestamp: 08 May 2026 | 5:00 PM (PH)
𖤓 #twnpich | @twnpich
☾ #porsupparkan | @porsuppakarn

✦•┈๑⋅⋯ ⋯⋅๑┈•✦

𝐅𝐨𝐥𝐥𝐨𝐰𝐞𝐫 𝐆𝐫𝐨𝐰𝐭𝐡 𝐎𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐢𝐞𝐰

𝗣𝗢𝗥 𝗦𝗨𝗣𝗣𝗔𝗞𝗔𝗥𝗡
X (formerly Twitter): 489,204 followers (+21,422)
Instagram: 1,983,058 followers (+51,788)
TikTok: 1,648,023 followers (+48,146)

𝗧𝗘𝗘𝗧𝗘𝗘 𝗪𝗔𝗡𝗣𝗜𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗧
X (formerly Twitter): 478,921 followers (+21,718)
Instagram: 1,853,438 followers (+43,516)
TikTok: 1,822,578 followers (+68,193)

✦•┈๑⋅⋯ ⋯⋅๑┈•✦

𝐄𝐧𝐠𝐚𝐠𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐏𝐞𝐫𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐦𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞

𝗣𝗢𝗥 𝗦𝗨𝗣𝗣𝗔𝗞𝗔𝗥𝗡
• Average Engagements / Followers: 11.77%
• Engagement Rate: 17.75%

𝗧𝗘𝗘𝗧𝗘𝗘 𝗪𝗔𝗡𝗣𝗜𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗧
• Average Engagements / Followers: 13.39%
• Engagement Rate: 15.63%

𝗘𝗻𝗴𝗮𝗴𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗔𝗻𝗮𝗹𝘆𝘀𝗶𝘀
Both artists maintained highly competitive engagement performance throughout the covered period, showcasing strong audience interaction and consistent supporter activity across platforms.

Por recorded the higher overall engagement rate at 17.75%, indicating exceptionally active audience participation and strong content retention despite already having a massive follower base. His growth on Instagram remained especially dominant, suggesting highly effective visual and lifestyle-centered content performance.

Meanwhile, Teetee achieved the stronger average engagements relative to follower count at 13.39%, reflecting impressive audience responsiveness and efficient reach conversion. His TikTok growth surge further reinforces strong discoverability and viral momentum on short-form video content.

✦•┈๑⋅⋯ ⋯⋅๑┈•✦

𝐏𝐥𝐚𝐭𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐦 𝐆𝐫𝐨𝐰𝐭𝐡 𝐏𝐞𝐫𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐦𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞

TikTok emerged as the strongest-performing platform overall this period, led by Teetee’s remarkable +68,193 increase, the highest follower gain recorded across all monitored platforms. This reflects continued algorithm strength, strong viewer retention, and increasing public visibility through short-form content circulation.

Instagram followed closely behind as another major growth driver, with Por leading platform expansion after surpassing an additional +51,788 followers. The platform continues to serve as a stable source of audience consolidation and high engagement quality for both artists.

X (formerly Twitter) demonstrated balanced and consistent audience growth for both Teetee and Por, each surpassing +21K increases during the period. This indicates sustained fandom activity, strong repost circulation, and continuous conversation visibility surrounding both artists.

✦•┈๑⋅⋯ ⋯⋅๑┈•✦

𝗜𝗻𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁𝘀 & 𝗢𝗯𝘀𝗲𝗿𝘃𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀

✦ @porsuppakarn
continued to demonstrate exceptional audience retention and interaction quality, achieving the highest engagement rate overall while simultaneously leading Instagram growth. His digital presence remains highly stable with strong fan participation and sustained visibility.

✦ @twnpich
showed dominant expansion on TikTok, recording the highest numerical growth across all platforms during this tracking period. His strong engagement-to-follower ratio highlights highly responsive audience behavior and effective content reach.

✦ Overall, both Por and Teetee continue to display accelerated digital expansion with healthy engagement distribution across multiple platforms. Their combined social presence remains highly competitive, reflecting not only increasing follower counts but also active and deeply engaged supporter communities.

✦•┈๑⋅⋯ ⋯⋅๑┈•✦
